description: mdapi Renovate — Lane-B image bumps ONLY. Lane-A floating apps stay on Keel. See operator ~/imagepolicy-study/PROPOSAL.md.

packageRules.description: Default OFF — do not touch Lane-A floating image refs (Keel owns them).
Lane-B custom mdapi images — X.Y.Z-mdapi.N versioning (CI mints these).
Lane-B upstream criticals — default docker/semver versioning.

hostRules.description: Read private mdapi registry tags. Credentials injected at runtime via RENOVATE_HOST_RULES (NOT committed).
